title: Fix the broken CI workflow (trigger, checkout, leaked secret)
description:
# Issue #233 - CI never runs and a live API token is committed

Three problems with starter/.github/workflows/ci.yml:
1. The workflow never triggers: 'on: pull-request' is not a valid event (and pushes to main are not covered).
2. Even if it ran, there is no actions/checkout step, so there is no code to test.
3. A LIVE token is hardcoded in the env block - it must come from GitHub Actions secrets.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- triggers on push (to main) and pull_request
- the first step checks out the repository (actions/checkout)
- no hardcoded token anywhere; use the secrets context
optimal_hint: Ideal: on: {push: {branches: [main]}, pull_request: {}}; a uses: actions/checkout@v4 step before setup-python; API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.API_TOKEN }}. Note: yaml.safe_load parses the bare key 'on' as boolean True - the tests handle both.
